title: 2026-06-29 국제 정세 브리핑
overallSummary: 아직 AI 요약 API 키가 설정되지 않아, 신뢰 가능한 원문 기사 후보 목록만 정리했습니다. GitHub Secrets에 GROQ_API_KEY를 추가하면 다음 실행부터 한국어 요약과 영향 분석이 자동 생성됩니다.

items.originalTitle: Mideast Live Updates: Dispute Over Strait Deepens as U.S. and Iran Trade Attacks
items.content: In a fourth day of hostilities, Iran said that it had targeted a U.S. naval base in Bahrain and a Kuwaiti air base with drones and missiles. No major damage or casualties were reported.

items.title: Deep Under the Rubble, Rescuers Find an 11-Year-Old Boy Alive
items.originalTitle: Deep Under the Rubble, Rescuers Find an 11-Year-Old Boy Alive
